field.name: contract_json
field.eval: { 'view_orchestration': { 'context': { 'source': 'smart_construction_core.product_release', 'source_status': 'product_release' }, 'views': { 'form': { 'title': '销项开票登记', 'composition_mode': 'entry_semantic_surface', 'columns': 2, 'sections': [ {'title': '办理主信息', 'sequence': 10, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['state', 'validation_status', 'name', 'invoice_flow_label', 'business_category_id', 'direction']}, {'title': '项目与合同', 'sequence': 20, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['project_id', 'company_id', 'partner_id', 'contract_id', 'settlement_id']}, {'title': '申请与单据', 'sequence': 30, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['document_no', 'document_date', 'application_date', 'applicant_name', 'expected_receipt_date']}, {'title': '发票信息', 'sequence': 40, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['invoice_date', 'recognition_date', 'invoice_state', 'invoice_no', 'invoice_code', 'invoice_type', 'invoice_count', 'invoice_content']}, {'title': '金额税额', 'sequence': 50, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['tax_rate', 'tax_type', 'amount_no_tax', 'tax_amount', 'amount_total', 'actual_invoice_amount', 'surcharge_amount', 'related_receipt_amount', 'currency_id']}, {'title': '开票单位', 'sequence': 60, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['recipient_unit_name', 'invoice_issue_company', 'actual_invoice_issue_company', 'invoice_provider_name']}, {'title': '办理与核算', 'sequence': 70, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['handler_name', 'invoice_holder', 'accounting_state', 'voucher_no', 'push_result', 'kingdee_document_no']}, {'title': '说明与附件', 'sequence': 80, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['note', 'attachment_ids', 'invoice_attachment_text']}, {'title': '来源追溯', 'sequence': 90, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['legacy_source_model', 'legacy_source_table', 'legacy_record_id', 'legacy_document_state', 'creator_name', 'created_time', 'source_created_by', 'source_created_at', 'active']} ], 'fields': [ {'name': 'state', 'sequence': 10, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'validation_status', 'sequence': 20, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'name', 'sequence': 30}, {'name': 'invoice_flow_label', 'sequence': 40, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'business_category_id', 'sequence': 50}, {'name': 'direction', 'sequence': 60}, {'name': 'project_id', 'sequence': 70}, {'name': 'company_id', 'sequence': 80, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'partner_id', 'sequence': 90}, {'name': 'contract_id', 'sequence': 100}, {'name': 'settlement_id', 'sequence': 110}, {'name': 'document_no', 'sequence': 120}, {'name': 'document_date', 'sequence': 130}, {'name': 'application_date', 'sequence': 140}, {'name': 'applicant_name', 'sequence': 150}, {'name': 'expected_receipt_date', 'sequence': 160}, {'name': 'invoice_date', 'sequence': 170}, {'name': 'recognition_date', 'sequence': 180}, {'name': 'invoice_state', 'sequence': 190}, {'name': 'invoice_no', 'sequence': 200}, {'name': 'invoice_code', 'sequence': 210}, {'name': 'invoice_type', 'sequence': 220}, {'name': 'invoice_count', 'sequence': 230}, {'name': 'invoice_content', 'sequence': 240}, {'name': 'tax_rate', 'sequence': 250}, {'name': 'tax_type', 'sequence': 260}, {'name': 'amount_no_tax', 'sequence': 270}, {'name': 'tax_amount', 'sequence': 280}, {'name': 'amount_total', 'sequence': 290}, {'name': 'actual_invoice_amount', 'sequence': 300}, {'name': 'surcharge_amount', 'sequence': 310}, {'name': 'related_receipt_amount', 'sequence': 320}, {'name': 'currency_id', 'sequence': 330}, {'name': 'recipient_unit_name', 'sequence': 340}, {'name': 'invoice_issue_company', 'sequence': 350}, {'name': 'actual_invoice_issue_company', 'sequence': 360}, {'name': 'invoice_provider_name', 'sequence': 370}, {'name': 'handler_name', 'sequence': 380}, {'name': 'invoice_holder', 'sequence': 390}, {'name': 'accounting_state', 'sequence': 400}, {'name': 'voucher_no', 'sequence': 410}, {'name': 'push_result', 'sequence': 420}, {'name': 'kingdee_document_no', 'sequence': 430}, {'name': 'note', 'sequence': 440}, {'name': 'attachment_ids', 'sequence': 450}, {'name': 'invoice_attachment_text', 'sequence': 460, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_source_model', 'sequence': 470, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_source_table', 'sequence': 480, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_record_id', 'sequence': 490, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_document_state', 'sequence': 500, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'creator_name', 'sequence': 510, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'created_time', 'sequence': 520, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'source_created_by', 'sequence': 530, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'source_created_at', 'sequence': 540, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'active', 'sequence': 550} ] } } } }

field.name: contract_json

['invoice_date', 'recognition_date', 'invoice_state', 'invoice_no', 'invoice_code', 'invoice_type', 'invoice_count', 'invoice_content']}, {'title': '金额税额', 'sequence': 50, 'columns': 2, 'fields': 'invoice_content', 'sequence': 240}, {'name': 'tax_rate', 'sequence': 250}, {'name': 'tax_type', 'sequence': 260}, {'name': 'amount_no_tax', 'sequence': 270}, {'name': 'tax_amount', 'sequence': 280}, {'name': 'amount_total', 'sequence': 290}, {'name': 'actual_invoice_amount', 'sequence': 300}, {'name': 'surcharge_amount', 'sequence': 310}, {'name': 'related_receipt_amount', 'sequence': 320}, {'name': 'currency_id', 'sequence': 330}, {'name': 'recipient_unit_name', 'sequence': 340}, {'name': 'invoice_issue_company', 'sequence': 350}, {'name': 'actual_invoice_issue_company', 'sequence': 'sequence': 480, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_record_id', 'sequence': 490, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'legacy_document_state', 'sequence': 500, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'creator_name', 'sequence': 540, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'active', 'sequence': 550} ] } } } }

field.name: contract_json
field.eval: { 'view_orchestration': { 'context': { 'source': 'smart_construction_core.product_release', 'source_status': 'product_release' }, 'views': { 'form': { 'title': '预缴税款', 'composition_mode': 'entry_semantic_surface', 'columns': 2, 'sections': [ {'title': '办理主信息', 'sequence': 10, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['state', 'validation_status', 'name', 'invoice_flow_label', 'business_category_id', 'direction']}, {'title': '项目与合同', 'sequence': 20, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['project_id', 'company_id', 'partner_id', 'contract_id', 'settlement_id']}, {'title': '申请与单据', 'sequence': 30, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['document_no', 'document_date', 'application_date', 'applicant_name', 'expected_receipt_date']}, {'title': '发票信息', 'sequence': 40, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['invoice_date', 'recognition_date', 'invoice_state', 'invoice_no', 'invoice_code', 'invoice_type', 'invoice_count', 'invoice_content']}, {'title': '金额税额', 'sequence': 50, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['tax_rate', 'tax_type', 'amount_no_tax', 'tax_amount', 'amount_total', 'actual_invoice_amount', 'surcharge_amount', 'related_receipt_amount', 'currency_id']}, {'title': '完税凭证', 'sequence': 60, 'columns': 2, 'invoice_provider_name']}, {'title': '办理与核算', 'sequence': 80, 'columns': 2, 'fields': ['handler_name', 'invoice_holder', 'accounting_state', 'voucher_no', 'push_result', 'kingdee_document_no']}, 'legacy_source_table', 'legacy_record_id', 'legacy_document_state', 'creator_name', 'created_time', 'source_created_by', 'source_created_at', 'active']} ], 'fields': [ {'name': 'state', 'sequence': 'business_category_id', 'sequence': 50}, {'name': 'direction', 'sequence': 60}, {'name': 'project_id', 'sequence': 70}, {'name': 'company_id', 'sequence': 80, 'readonly': True}, {'name': 'partner_id', 'recognition_date', 'sequence': 180}, {'name': 'invoice_state', 'sequence': 190}, {'name': 'invoice_no', 'sequence': 200}, {'name': 'invoice_code', 'sequence': 210}, {'name': 'invoice_type', 'sequence': 220}, {'name': 'invoice_count', 'sequence': 230}, {'name': 'invoice_content', 'sequence': 240}, {'name': 'tax_rate', 'sequence': 250}, {'name': 'tax_type', 'sequence': 260}, {'name':
